name: BizDeedz — Weekly Report (Scaffold — Not Active V1)
notes: SCAFFOLD ONLY. Not active in V1. Activate in Phase 2. See docs/roadmap.md.

nodes.name: Cron — Monday 8:00 AM Central
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 8:00 AM Central. Activate in Phase 2.

nodes.name: Read Last 7 Days from Sheets
nodes.notes: Reads all signals. Next step filters to last 7 days.

nodes.name: Filter + Format Week Signals
nodes.notes: Filters to last 7 days and builds compact input for weekly report synthesis.

nodes.name: IF — Signals Exist This Week
nodes.notes: Guard: if zero signals this week, skip synthesis entirely to avoid confusing LLM output. True branch proceeds. False branch terminates — no email sent (silence is fine for a zero-signal week).

values.content:
=You are a strategic market intelligence analyst for BizDeedz and Turea Simpson.

Synthesize the past 7 days of high-value signals into a strategic weekly report.

Period: {{ $json.dateStr }}
Total signals this week: {{ $json.signal_count }}

SIGNALS:
{{ $json.weekly_signals_input }}

Generate a weekly report using this structure:

## Recurring Pain Themes This Week
1. **[Theme]** — [description and frequency note]
2-3. ...

## Strongest BizDeedz Themes
1. **[Theme]** — [why it matters and what it suggests]
2-3. ...

## Strongest Turea Simpson Themes
1. **[Theme]** — [why it resonates and what content it supports]
2-3. ...

## Rising Tools or Topics
1. **[Tool/Topic]** — [what it is and why gaining attention]
2. ...

## Suggested Offer or Positioning Changes
- [Observation and suggestion]
- [Observation and suggestion]

## 5 Post Ideas for Next Week
1. **[Post title]** (Brand: BizDeedz/Turea/Both | Platform: LinkedIn/Newsletter) — [brief angle]
2-5. ...

## 3 Business Development Opportunities
1. **[Opportunity]** — [source, context, recommended next step]
2-3. ...

Be substantive. Synthesize across signals — do not list individual items.

nodes.name: Weekly Report Synthesis (Premium)
nodes.notes: Single premium model call for weekly synthesis. Based on prompts/summarize_weekly_report.md.

nodes.name: Format Weekly Email
nodes.notes: Formats weekly report as HTML email.

nodes.name: Send Weekly Report Email
nodes.notes: Sends weekly report to both recipients.

meta.description: SCAFFOLD ONLY — NOT ACTIVE IN V1. Weekly report workflow for Phase 2. Zero-signals guard added: synthesis is skipped entirely if no signals this week. Reads last 7 days from Google Sheets, synthesizes trends, emails Monday mornings.
